final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand identity system presentation for "染秋 (RAN QIU)", an autumn-themed fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy.

Style/medium: clean editorial brand guideline layout, minimalist Japanese design aesthetic meets contemporary Chinese luxury
Composition: three-panel grid layout (primary color / secondary color / typography), generous white space, centered alignment
Subject: "染秋" brand identity system showing color swatches with CMYK/RGB values and Chinese typeface specimens
Color palette: warm autumnal terracotta and persimmon orange as primary, muted sage and amber gold as secondary, off-white background
Text (verbatim): "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: colors must evoke autumn foliage and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics; typography must balance modern minimalism with classical Chinese character structure; all text must be legible at both large display and small packaging sizes
Avoid: generic gradient backgrounds; neon colors; Western serif fonts; cluttered information density; Behance-style over-decoration
